old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-0met","title":"senml: missing SenML-JSON codec for RFC 8428 completeness","description":"File: rust/lichen-senml/src/lib.rs

RFC 8428 defines two encodings:
1. SenML-JSON (Content-Format 110) - human-readable
2. SenML-CBOR (Content-Format 112) - binary

This crate only implements CBOR encoding. While CBOR is preferred for constrained devices (LICHEN's target), JSON support would enable:
1. Debugging (human-readable output)
2. Interop with JSON-based systems
3. Complete RFC 8428 compliance

The no_std constraint makes JSON harder (no serde_json), but a minimal JSON encoder could be implemented.

Impact: Incomplete RFC 8428 support; debugging harder without JSON view.

Note: This is an enhancement, not a bug. The current scope is reasonable for embedded use.","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:41:34.789032Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:41:34.789059Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-0met","title":"senml: missing SenML-JSON codec for RFC 8428 completeness","description":"File: rust/lichen-senml/src/lib.rs

RFC 8428 defines two encodings:
1. SenML-JSON (Content-Format 110) - human-readable
2. SenML-CBOR (Content-Format 112) - binary

This crate only implements CBOR encoding. While CBOR is preferred for constrained devices (LICHEN's target), JSON support would enable:
1. Debugging (human-readable output)
2. Interop with JSON-based systems
3. Complete RFC 8428 compliance

The no_std constraint makes JSON harder (no serde_json), but a minimal JSON encoder could be implemented.

Impact: Incomplete RFC 8428 support; debugging harder without JSON view.

Note: This is an enhancement, not a bug. new_value: {"notes":"Commit: 8b29e1665 (added serde JSON support for RFC 8428 compliance)"}
Implemented SenML-JSON support via optional serde feature on Record (short field names, skip None); updated docs, Cargo.toml; tests pass under feature
